title: Rilis Pertama — v1.0.0
description: Rilis pertama ArkanProjects dengan installer Pterodactyl lengkap dan website landing page.
changes: 7 tema built-in: Nebula, Recolor, Darkenate, Abyss Purple, Crimson, Amber, Emerald
MuLTiAcidi addons panel (Minecraft, Rust, CS2, FiveM, ARK, GMod, Valheim, 7DTD)
Addon sistem: phpMyAdmin, fail2ban, backup otomatis, swap, Node.js, Yarn
SSL Let's Encrypt dengan fallback otomatis
Firewall (UFW + firewalld) dengan konfigurasi port otomatis
Full uninstall: panel, wings, Docker cleanup
Dukungan 6 distro: Ubuntu 22/24, Debian 10-13, Rocky 8/9, AlmaLinux 8/9
Website landing page dengan auto-detect tools dari /installer/
